name: Feature or Change Request
description: Propose a new feature, improvement, refactor, tooling, or documentation change
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Summary
<!-- Briefly describe the request or the problem to solve. -->

## Type of Request
- [ ] Feature / Enhancement
- [ ] Refactor / Technical Debt
- [ ] Tooling / CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug / Regression
- [ ] Question / Discussion
- [ ] Other: __________________

## Context & Motivation
<!-- Why is this needed? What is the context, impact, or motivation? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the desired solution or change. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Scope / Impacted Areas (optional)
<!-- If relevant, specify domains, modules, or layers impacted (e.g. frontend, backend, CI, docs, etc.). -->
- [ ] auth
- [ ] documents
- [ ] ai
- [ ] users
- [ ] admin
- [ ] analytics
- [ ] mcp
- [ ] shared
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] backend
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] docs
- [ ] Not applicable

## Traceability (optional)
- **BMAD Project Key / Story / Epic / Artefact**: <!-- Link or reference if applicable -->
- **Related Issue(s) / PR(s)**: <!-- #num, links, etc. -->

## Acceptance Criteria / Definition of Done
<!-- Success criteria, validation conditions, or "Definition of Done". -->

## Breaking change? (optional)
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

## Risks / Points to watch (optional)
<!-- List potential risks, unexpected impacts, or points to monitor during implementation. -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, links, ADRs, diagrams, etc. -->
